title: dipterocarpus malaanonan
intro: Dipterocarpus malaanonan, also known as the Philippine red ironwood, is a large tree species native to the Philippines, belonging to the family Dipterocarpaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and other respiratory issues, due to its rich content of flavonoids, tannins, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Dipterocarpus malaanonan include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Dipterocarpus malaanonan include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
